name: Vitamin D
summary: Vitamin D is normalized as a DO-HEALTH combination component in DNA-methylation clock analyses.
mechanism_summary: Represents vitamin D supplementation tested alongside omega-3 and exercise in older adults, with linked evidence bounded to epigenetic-clock biomarkers.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: DO-HEALTH omega-3 showed small DNA-methylation clock slowing; DO-HEALTH omega-3 vitamin D exercise DNA-methylation clock analysis.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
